title: Simple Tool Upgrades
description: Adds craftable upgrades that allow you to customize your desired tool the way you want!
body:
Simple Upgrades is a small mod that allows you to create your dream tool! 

you will first want to start by creating your tool(s) of choice. currently supported are. Sword, Axe, Shovel, Hoe, Pickaxe.

then craft some empty upgrades to start your upgrading journey!

some upgrades can't be put on any item, for example, Damage Upgrade can't be put on a pickaxe, but only the sword and Axe.

All upgrades are applied through the crafting table!
simply put the tool in the middle and add your upgrade!

known bugs
can't put more than one upgrade on at once though it will let you.
upgrading a tool and having another tool in the crafting table will result in losing your tool.

As long as you upgrade 1 tool with 1 upgrade at a time you should be fine!

if you have any questions or have an idea you can message me on discord at fluffy#9911!
